name: Equality of Readout Functions
description: Theorem proving that readout functions are equal for two systems with properly aligned projective readout and identical state and output spaces.

elements.text: If Z1 and Z2 are systems with properly aligned projective readout, SZ1 = SZ2 and OZ1 = OZ2, then RZ1 = RZ2.
PJNi(RZ1(x)) = RiZ1(x) = PJNi(x) = RiZ2(x) = PJNi(RZ2(x)) for every state x and output port i.
RZ1(x) = RZ2(x) for every state x by Theorem A1.178.
